input_text: I'm feeling great today! The morning coffee was amazing, and I went for a run and met some friends. It feels like I'm getting back on track.
Everything is going wonderfully. I got a promotion at work and my family is doing well. Life is really good right now.
I had the best weekend! We went hiking, the weather was perfect, and I felt so alive and energized.
Therapy has been incredible. I feel like I'm finally making progress and understanding myself better. Thank you so much.
I woke up feeling hopeful for the first time in months. I actually enjoyed breakfast and went outside to feel the sun.
I can't seem to enjoy anything anymore. Everything feels empty and meaningless. I don't know what's wrong with me.
I've been crying every night. Nothing helps. I feel like a burden to everyone around me.
I'm exhausted all the time. I can't get out of bed most days. My body aches and I have no energy for anything.
Everything is falling apart. I lost my job, my relationship is over, and I don't see a way forward.
I feel hopeless and trapped. Every day is the same miserable routine and nothing ever changes.
The weather forecast says it will be sunny tomorrow. I might go to the store later.
I had my regular check-up appointment on Tuesday. The doctor said everything looks normal.
I drove to work this morning. Traffic was about average for a weekday. Nothing unusual happened.
The meeting is scheduled for 3pm. We need to review the quarterly report and plan next steps.
I ate lunch at noon. Had a sandwich and some water. Then went back to my desk.
I'm doing fine. Everything is okay I guess. Nothing to worry about really.
Yeah I'm alright. Things are fine. I mean, nothing's great but nothing's terrible either, you know?
I'm managing. It's fine. People have it worse than me so I shouldn't complain.
Things are okay. I'm just tired but that's normal for everyone right? I'm fine.
I told my family I'm doing great. I smile at work. Everything is totally fine on the surface.
I used to love hiking but now even the view feels meh. Nothing excites me anymore.
My friends invited me out but I just couldn't bring myself to go. I don't enjoy socializing like I used to.
Food tastes bland. Music sounds flat. I used to love cooking and playing guitar but now I feel nothing.
I watched my favorite movie last night and felt absolutely nothing. It used to make me laugh so hard.
Even playing with my kids doesn't bring me joy anymore. I go through the motions but inside I'm empty.
Um, hi Ellie. Yeah things have been, uh, okay I guess. Work is work, you know? Just getting through the days.
Ellie, uh, I don't know. Since early this week I just can't seem to enjoy anything. I used to love hiking but now even the view feels meh.
Hey Ellie, actually things have been pretty good! I started exercising again and I'm sleeping better. Feeling more like myself.
Ellie, I can't get any sleep. Like every night I lie awake for hours. I feel exhausted during the day and my concentration is off.
Um, yeah, Ellie, I've been keeping busy. Went to the park with the dog. Weather was nice. Nothing too crazy, just wanted to chat.
Okay.
The medication is working but I still feel empty inside.
I don't know.
